emails.subject: Meter 1601
emails.body: Meter 1601 Daren meter 1601 has flow from 11/8-11/10. There is no deal for these days. Last deal used was for Oct. 413538, counterparty Southern Union. Will you let me know if you set a deal up for this? Thanks. Aimee
